overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark coat exploring a misty, frost-covered forest environment. The character walks along a trail past a pond, through rocky corridors, and approaches ancient stone ruins with a wooden cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty forest trail approaching a pond

events.description: path opens up to reveal a misty pond surrounded by rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a frost-covered path toward a misty pond

entered.detail: calm water surface surrounded by rocks and tall trees
tall mossy rock formation with layered stone
dense evergreen trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a frost-covered forest trail as the path opens to reveal a misty pond. Tall rock formations and pine trees frame the scene in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pond shoreline with broken wooden structures

events.description: character stops at pond edge and looks around at the surroundings
character turns away from the pond to continue along the path

agents.ego_description: pausing at the water's edge to survey the misty surroundings before turning to continue

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and rails partially submerged near the shore

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the pond's edge to observe the surroundings, revealing broken wooden fence posts in the water. After a moment, the character turns away from the pond to continue exploring.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage between tall stone walls

events.description: leaves the open pond area and enters a narrow corridor with rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking through a confined passage with steep rock walls flanking both sides

entered.detail: tall layered rock formation with mossy surface
overhanging rock cliff creating partial cover

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the pond behind and enters a narrow rocky corridor. Tall stone walls rise on both sides of the dirt path, creating an enclosed feeling as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone staircase leading to elevated wooden structure

events.description: approaching ancient stone steps built into the hillside
beginning to ascend the weathered stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing weathered stone steps toward a rustic wooden cabin at the top of the ridge

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone steps built into the rock face
small rustic wooden structure with sloped roof at the top of the stairs
cluster of bright yellow flowers growing on the mossy rocks

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and begins ascending an ancient stone staircase. Bright yellow wildflowers dot the rocks on the right, while a rustic wooden cabin becomes visible at the top of the steps ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frost-covered forest that transitions from an open, misty waterfront into a confined rocky passage and finally toward an elevated ruin. It begins with the character walking along a frozen trail that opens up to reveal a misty pond framed by pine trees and towering rock formations. As the character pauses at the water's edge to observe broken wooden fence posts, the perspective then shifts away from the pond to enter a narrow rocky corridor with high stone walls pressing in from both sides. The scene then expands as the character leaves the enclosure to ascend an ancient stone staircase dotted with bright yellow wildflowers. Finally, the camera follows the climb upward until a rustic wooden cabin comes into view at the top of the steps.
